title: Jelly Blob Friend
bio: Gloopy Junebug is a jelly blob friend who wiggles when anyone says pudding. They feel curious, collect shiny crumbs inside their belly, and boop every pebble hello.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw one big wobbly blob shape. Add a flat soft curve along the bottom so it sits on the page.
steps.hint: Let the outline be uneven; jelly blobs should not be perfect circles.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, draw two round eyes and a small smiling mouth. Add lifted eyebrows for a curious look.
steps.hint: Place the face slightly low to make the blob feel extra squishy.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add little shiny crumb shapes inside the blob, cheek circles, and a few wobble lines around the sides.
steps.hint: Inside details can be simple dots, stars, and tiny ovals.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the blob outline, face, crumbs, cheeks, and wobble lines. Keep the outer line smooth but bouncy.
steps.hint: One clear outline is better than many tiny bumps.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the jelly body and inside crumbs. Add a soft shadow below and a pale highlight on one side.
steps.hint: A simple curved highlight makes Gloopy look glossy and soft.
